dict.string: Nutriscope AI needs photo access to analyze your meals.
Nutriscope AI uses the camera to scan meals for protein and calorie estimates.
Nutriscope AI uses the microphone so you can describe meals by voice.
Nutriscope AI converts your spoken meal description into text for logging.
Nutriscope AI reads workouts and sleep from Apple Health to personalize coaching and insights.
Nutriscope AI may save nutrition summaries to Apple Health when you choose to sync.
